svg.title: BillingShield end-to-end architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing CMS data split into 5 parts, ingested into Databricks, processed through Bronze, Silver, Gold medallion layers, then dbt, ML, FastAPI, and Streamlit

g.text: Split into 5 parts (aa → ae) for Databricks Community Edition upload
Ingest CSV as-is · 1,999,999 rows · 28 cols · EDA: nulls, stats, specialty analysis, anomaly flags
Schema validation · cast types · drop $0.00005 charges · referential integrity · dedup on NPI+HCPCS
Add derived cols: charge_to_payment_ratio, billing_intensity · Notebook: 02_silver_transform.py
XGBoost fraud classifier · SHAP explainability · Critical / Elevated / Normal risk tiers
Identified $2.3B+ anomalous billing across 500B+ claims universe
Inference endpoint · fraud scores per provider
